title: Skies of CD-I Legend Part 2 (Link Nukem Vs The Blue Wolf fight only)
description:
This is a video I made years ago, I trolled people with a small preview of this fight in one April Fools video and many people were pissed even to this day so... Here is the actual full fight.

Also here is the link to the music used in this video. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kr0JaDoZMwg
